description: Enterprise-scale production deployment supporting high concurrency, large datasets, and diverse workloads across multiple business units. Handles parallel batch processing, real-time scoring, and many concurrent analytical sessions with terabyte-scale data.
useCases: Enterprise-wide analytics platform across multiple departments
Large-scale batch processing with multi-TB datasets
Real-time fraud/risk scoring with Intelligent Decisioning
Multiple SAS offerings running simultaneously (VA, VDMML, Forecasting, ID)
userCount: 25-50+ concurrent sessions with parallel batch workloads
dataVolume: Multiple TB on disk / 1+ TB lifted into memory
kubernetesWorkers: Large managed Kubernetes cluster with dedicated node pools. Separate CAS, Compute, Stateless, and Connect node groups.
cpuPerNode: Varies by cloud provider — refer to official SAS sizing guide for exact instance types
ramPerNode: High-memory instances required for CAS nodes. Compute nodes sized for parallel session handling.
storage: High-throughput SSD/NVMe (90-120 MB/sec per core target). Shared filesystem for persistent storage. Object storage for archival.
network: Accelerated networking mandatory. All CAS/Compute in placement group. High bandwidth (25+ Gbps) for distributed CAS operations.
estimatedMonthlyCost: Contact SAS/VST ECS for cloud cost estimate based on your provider and region
hadrNotes: Multi-AZ required for production. Active-passive or active-active CAS failover. Auto-scaling for burst capacity. Full HA/DR architecture recommended.
cloudVsOnprem: Available on AWS (EKS), Azure (AKS), Google Cloud (GKE), and Red Hat OpenShift. On-premises Kubernetes deployments fully supported for data sovereignty.
viyaTier: SAS Viya Advanced or SAS Viya Enterprise — Enterprise adds Intelligent Decisioning, Event Stream Processing, and full production MLOps automation
typicalCustomers: Top-tier banks, national telcos, large conglomerates, government agencies with enterprise analytics mandates
